name: Mordred - Knight of Treachery
author: Chaldea
description: Adds Mordred (Saber of Red) from Fate/Grand Order: the Knight of Rebellion who tanks behind the Helm of Infidelity, tears it off to cash crimson-lightning crits with Clarent, and crowns it with Clarent Blood Arthur. Saberface, but do NOT call her a girl.
